description: This pipeline performs image enhancement by first applying a smoothing filter to reduce noise and blur the image, and then adjusting the contrast using histogram normalization methods to improve the overall visibility of the image features.

28e586d2-8078-4128-8a06-802433368e4e.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
28e586d2-8078-4128-8a06-802433368e4e.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

5263b3cc-afc1-4ce1-8bf6-b6bba179d8eb.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
5263b3cc-afc1-4ce1-8bf6-b6bba179d8eb.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
